description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden storage box with a dark brown finish, featuring a removable flat lid and visible metal corner reinforcements. The box is divided into two main compartments, one of which contains a grid of smaller wooden blocks or dividers, while the other is empty and covered by the lid. Both compartments have metal handles on the shorter ends, suggesting ease of transport. The wood grain is visible, giving the box a rustic and sturdy appearance, suitable for heavy-duty or outdoor use. The construction appears robust, with reinforced edges and a design that prioritizes durability and functionality. The overall look suggests it is intended for secure storage of tools, equipment, or other valuable items in urban or industrial environments.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden storage box with metal corner reinforcements, removable lid, and side handles. One compartment features a grid of dividers, while the other is open for general storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the box with its lid removed, revealing the divided and open compartments, and the metal handles on the ends.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both compartments side by side, with the grid of dividers visible in one and the flat lid placed next to the box.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open compartments and the lid, with handles visible on the ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the box from the other side, with the lid placed in front and the divided compartment clearly visible.
